title: C919 E-TRAS — quick deploy + idle reverse hold (S0→S5)
description: Compressed deploy via start_deploy_sequence shortcut. TRA goes from +5° to -12.5° in 2s — past tra_idle_reverse_deg (-11.74°) so fadec_deploy_command can fire, but well above the -25° max-reverse threshold. Pilot holds idle-reverse — verifies S5 stability under steady throttle. Useful as a soak-test of the deploy chain.

events.note: compressed +5°→-12.5° ramp; passes through SW1/SW2 to set CMD2/CMD3 latches and crosses tra_idle_reverse_deg (-11.74°) to enable fadec_deploy_command
still active — S5 holds while TRA stays in reverse
